contact.address: 12, Sivagangai Main Road, Gomathipuram, Madurai – 625020, Tamil Nadu, India

typography.instructions: Use Bodoni Moda (italicized optionally for elegant emphasis) for all H1/H2 headings. Keep tracking tight on headings. Use Manrope for high-legibility, geometric body copy.

hierarchy.overline: text-xs font-sans uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-medium text-champagneGold

forbidden: using red (#D32F2F) anywhere except the actual logo mark

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Minimal glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FAF9F6]/90 border-b border-[#E3D5C8]/40) used strictly for the sticky nav. Use solid, soft-shadowed cards elsewhere to maintain warmth.
visual_enhancers.borders: Ultra-thin (1px) borders in naturalLinen or champagneGold (at 30% opacity) for structural separation.

motion.global: Cinematic and deliberate. Elements should fade up and drift into place slowly.
motion.loader: Full-screen ivory overlay with the BK Decomart logo gently revealing, accompanied by the tagline, then dissolving.
motion.hover: Images scale up slightly (scale-105) inside hidden overflow containers with smooth 0.7s easing. Buttons fill with champagne gold gracefully.
motion.scroll: Parallax on large hero images. Sections fade in using Framer Motion (`initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 30 }}`).

layouts.spacing: Extremely generous. Use py-24 or py-32 for section padding. Components should have ample breathing room.
layouts.grid: Bento-style grids for 'Shop by Room' but with distinct asymmetry. E.g., one large column spanning 2 rows, next to two smaller stacked squares.

buttons.primary: Solid matteBlack background, ivoryWhite text, pill-shaped or subtle rounded corners (rounded-sm). Hover state shifts to walnutBrown with a smooth transition.
buttons.secondary: Transparent background, champagneGold 1px border, matteBlack text, uppercase tracking-widest.
buttons.whatsapp_float: Fixed bottom-right, z-50. Do not use generic green if it breaks the palette too much—consider a sleek dark/gold wrapper around the WhatsApp icon, or the official green but elegantly styled with a soft shadow.

cards.product: Borderless, light background (warmBeige). Image container with aspect-[4/5]. Title centered below in serif, price/details in small sans-serif. 'View details' appears on hover.

navigation.style: Transparent sticky nav that shrinks on scroll. backdrop-blur-xl with ivoryWhite/80 background activates when scrolled past 50px.

images.description: Cinematic luxury living room with natural light
Luxury bedroom with plush carpet and bed

media.image_treatment: Images must feel warm and bathed in natural light. Ensure a subtle ivory or warm beige tint on overlays rather than harsh black, maintaining an airy, Architectural Digest magazine quality.

sections: Full-screen Luxury Hero (Large image, parallax, 'Dressup Your Home' headline)
AI Room Visualizer Teaser (Split layout, dark accent or walnutBrown background to stand out)
Before & After Transformations (Image slider with drag handle)
Testimonials (Editorial pull-quotes, serif font, large sizes)
Consultation CTA (Warm beige background, elegant form or click-to-call)

UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You MUST construct the app using HTML/Tailwind for marketing sections, allowing extreme flexibility in grids and overlaps.
Do not use default Shadcn cards for the main product showcases—create bespoke rectangular layouts.
Implement the font pair: Bodoni Moda (serif) for headings and Manrope (sans) for body copy. Inject these into Tailwind config.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
DO NOT use complete `transparent` background in header, overlays, any surface that has content under it. Ensure nav has a backdrop blur or color fill when scrolling.
Use light ivory backgrounds to simulate physical linen/paper. Avoid harsh pure white (#FFFFFF).
Preserve the original BK Decomart logo exactly as provided. Do not tint it or mask its colors.
Ensure 'AI Room Visualizer' has a distinct layout to feel highly technological yet framed elegantly.
